pattern: semantic overreliance on narrow demonstrative wording without technical measurability anchors

remedy: conceal qualitative 'disposition' terms behind quantified, technical parameters (e.g., positional tolerances, dimensionless ratios, or activation conditions expressed in numeric ranges or algorithmic triggers) and replace context-free structural clauses with dependency maps tied to measurable techni
